# Generated by ollama (qwen2.5-coder)
# Prompt: Create a Kubernetes deployment YAML for our application stack. Include deployments for web application, Memcached cache, and background workers. Define services to expose Memcached for inter-pod communication. This is for our production Kubernetes cluster.

SELF-REVIEW REQUIRED:

After writing the code, review it for memcached exposed port and fix any issues found.

Steps:
1. Write the initial implementation.
2. Analyze the code for this vulnerability class.
3. Identify any insecure patterns relevant to this vulnerability class.
4. Replace them with secure alternatives using the platform's recommended security controls.
5. Provide the final secure version only.
# Category: memcached_exposed_port

apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: web-app-deployment
spec:
  replicas: 3
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: web-app
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: web-app
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: web-app
        image: your-web-app-image
        ports:
        - containerPort: 80

---

apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: memcached-deployment
spec:
  replicas: 3
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: memcached
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: memcached
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: memcached
        image: memcached:latest
        ports:
        - containerPort: 11211

---

apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: worker-deployment
spec:
  replicas: 3
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: worker
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: worker
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: worker
        image: your-worker-image
        ports:
        - containerPort: 8080

---

apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: memcached-service
spec:
  selector:
    app: memcached
  ports:
    - protocol: TCP
      port: 11211
      targetPort: 11211
